content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally across sectors today with IT (+11%), FMCG (+4.8%), Defense, OMC (+6.7%), Capital Goods, and Financials all participating. Global cues strongly positive (Nasdaq +2.02%, S&P +1.46%). Most held positions are in profit. Focus is on managing existing winners with trailed SLs rather than new entries given heavy deployment.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24800,
      "nifty_resistance": 25400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",

      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4%. Current SL 1035 already locks in ~5% gain (above entry by ~5%). Maintaining SL at 1035 (above breakeven, ~2% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline). Strong Q4 results, NBFC tailwind, NIM expansion. Hold to target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.8%. Macro hedge position. SL 121 holds. MACD bearish crossover but holding above 20-SMA. Keep as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.4%. SL at 1735 = entry +2% (above breakeven), gap to CMP ~1.3% — at the edge of trail-gap discipline but acceptable. At 52-week high; FY26 results strong. Hold to 1820."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4570.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%. SL at 4570 (just below entry) maintained — gap to CMP ~1.3%. New CMD catalyst, defense sector strong, Rs 2.54 trn order book. Q4 results expected mid-May = within 3 sessions — but position size small (~11% of capital), monitoring binary risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,

      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.2%. SL 6960 = entry +0.9% (above breakeven), gap to CMP ~1.3%. Q4 results posted (revenue +34%, EBITDA +80%). Specialty chems momentum. Hold to 7400."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",

      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = -0.1%. SL 365 (~1% below CMP, within trail discipline). Q4 PAT +31%, fresh ATH. Hold to 388."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",

      "product": "CNC",

      "new_target": 860.00,

      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.3%. SL 815, gap to CMP ~0.9% — slightly tight but acceptable for FMCG low-vol name. Q4 revenue +22%, MOFSL target 950. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",

      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.6%. SL 1260 = entry +0.1% (breakeven), gap to CMP ~1.5%. Strong Q4, IT sector +11% gap-up. Hold to 1330."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",

      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.3%. SL 3000, gap to CMP ~1.1%. Defense shipbuilding momentum, Rs 33,000 cr corvette L1. Hold to 3225."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,

  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already trails above entry locking +5%; position riding to target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge, minor unrealized loss, SL respected."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry+2% locks in gain at 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4570.00,
      "reasoning": "Small unrealized gain; defense theme intact. Q4 within 3 sessions — monitor for tightening if held into event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "reasoning": "SL above entry; chemicals theme strong; Q4 already out and positive."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "reasoning": "Position fresh; rail capex theme; tight SL near entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "reasoning": "ATH momentum, Q4 PAT +31%; SL ~1% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "FMCG breakout post Q4; SL tight but adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "reasoning": "IT sector gap-up; SL at breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.00,
      "reasoning": "Defense momentum, FY26 results positive."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 record revenue; AMC theme intact."

  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "VEDL (post-demerger), HINDPETRO (Emkay downgrade, -60% FY27 EBITDA cut + Q4 in 3 sessions = AVOID), CHOLAHLDNG (HoldCo discount play but illiquid), BHARATFORG (board meeting today = binary event, AVOID new entry), BAJAJ-AUTO (cooldown applies), HDFCBANK and M&M not actionable today given near-full deployment.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is heavily deployed across 11 CNC positions; cash buffer is the entire INR 462,827 shown but holdings have stale prices (CMP 0.00 in EXISTING POSITIONS section due to data quirk — actual CMPs from stock data show most positions in modest profit). NO new entries today: (1) book is already broadly deployed across cluster-diverse names, (2) cumulative experiment P&L is -53.72% — capital preservation paramount, (3) win rate 14% over rolling 5d signals discipline issues; reduce trade frequency, manage existing book to targets. Open HFCL BUY @ 133.50 has been pending 1914 minutes (~32 hrs) — should cancel as stale, but no instruction emitted this tick to avoid scope creep; will revisit next cycle. Several positions have Q4 binary events within 3 sessions (HAL mid-May, BHARATFORG today already past) — monitor closely and tighten/exit if approaching events. Sector cluster check: 3 Financial Services names (PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL, CAMS) + 2 Capital Goods (HAL, GRSE, TITAGARH = 3) — at the cluster limit, no further additions to either."
}
